Panic recovery middleware catches all panics including broken pipe errors that should be handled differently
issues.suggested_fix: Consider separating broken pipe handling from other panic types for better error classification

issues.description: Context struct contains sync.RWMutex for Keys map which could be a bottleneck under high concurrency
issues.suggested_fix: Consider using sync.Map for better performance under high contention

issues.description: Router tree implementation has complex path matching logic that could benefit from more unit tests
issues.suggested_fix: Add more edge case tests for path parameter handling

issues.description: Binding interface doesn't enforce validation of input data before binding to structs
issues.suggested_fix: Add validation hooks or integrate with validator library by default

issues.description: Default error handlers don't include request IDs for tracing
issues.suggested_fix: Add request ID generation and include in error responses

issues.description: Context.Keys uses sync.RWMutex which can become a bottleneck under high request load. The mutex protects a map[any]any which means type assertions are needed on every access, adding overhead.
issues.suggested_fix: Consider using sync.Map for better scalability under high concurrency, or provide type-safe alternatives for common use cases.

issues.description: Engine.Run() uses http.ListenAndServe which doesn't set read/write timeouts by default. This could make the server vulnerable to slow client attacks.
issues.suggested_fix: Set reasonable ReadTimeout and WriteTimeout values on the http.Server, or make them configurable through Engine options.

issues.description: The router tree implementation has complex path parameter handling with multiple node types (static, param, catchAll). The logic for adding and finding routes could benefit from more comprehensive documentation.
issues.suggested_fix: Add detailed comments explaining the routing algorithm, especially the interaction between different node types and parameter precedence.

issues.description: Form binding doesn't validate maximum field sizes, which could lead to memory exhaustion attacks with very large form submissions.
issues.suggested_fix: Add configurable maximum size limits for form fields and reject requests that exceed them.

issues.description: JSON renderer uses json.Marshal which can be slow for large responses. No option for streaming JSON responses is provided.
issues.suggested_fix: Add support for streaming JSON responses using json.Encoder for better performance with large datasets.
